creator: tedm@ipinc.net
text:
We have the same general problem with this controller
under FreeBSD 8.0.  We get numerous

TIMEOUT - WRITE_DMA retrying (1 retry left) LBA=XXXXXXX

on the system with moderate to heavy load on the controller,
and eventually the system locks up.  Interestingly, the
problem didn't happen with OLDer SATA150 disks plugged into
the controller, but 150GB hard drives aren't that useable
nowadays.

There's been numerous postings on the mailing list about
these controllers.  Linux does not appear to have difficulty
with them so people seem to move these systems to Linux servers.

Here's the dmesg from our system, the system has since been
rehomed to Linux:
